mapper.sql: id, product_id, product_spec_id, product_spec_code, product_spec_name, code, `name`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into product_spec_value (product_id, product_spec_id, product_spec_code, product_spec_name, code, `name`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productSpecId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productSpecCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productSpecName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

mapper.update:
update product_spec_value
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_spec_id = #{productSpecId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_spec_code = #{productSpecCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_spec_name = #{productSpecName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update product_spec_value set product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_spec_id = #{productSpecId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_spec_code = #{productSpecCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_spec_name = #{productSpecName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

mapper.select: select id, product_spec_id, product_spec_code, product_spec_name, code, `name` from product_spec_value where product_spec_id = #{productSpecId} and product_id = #{productId}
select id, product_id, product_spec_id, product_spec_code, product_spec_name, code, `name` from product_spec_value where product_id = #{productId}
